page.title: Payees
page.subtitle: Manage your payees and their default categories

empty.title: No payees
empty.subtitle: Get started by creating a new payee.

merge.title: Merge Payee
merge.transactionCount: {count, plural, one {# transaction will be migrated} other {# transactions will be migrated}}
merge.addAsAliasLabel: Add "{name}" as an alias on the target payee
merge.willAddAlias: Add "{source}" as an alias so future imports auto-match

toasts.transactionsMigrated: {count, plural, one {# transaction migrated} other {# transactions migrated}}

categoryAutoAssign.title: Auto-Assign Default Categories
categoryAutoAssign.howItWorksBody: This feature analyzes your transaction history to suggest default categories for payees. It looks at which category is most commonly used for each payee and suggests assigning it as their default category for future transactions. You can always override the default category if needed.
categoryAutoAssign.minTransactionsHelp: Only consider payees with at least this many transactions
categoryAutoAssign.matchPercentageHelp: The category must be used in at least this percentage of transactions
categoryAutoAssign.onlyWithoutCategoryLabel: Only payees without a default category

empty.line1: No payees match the current criteria.

categoryAutoAssign.selectedCount: {count, plural, one {# payee selected} other {# payees selected}}
categoryAutoAssign.applyButton: Apply to {count, plural, one {# Payee} other {# Payees}}

toasts.selectAtLeastOne: Please select at least one payee to update

deactivateUnused.title: Deactivate Unused Payees
deactivateUnused.howItWorksBody: This feature finds payees that are rarely used and deactivates them. Deactivated payees will not appear in payee dropdowns when creating transactions, but their historical transactions are preserved. You can reactivate a payee at any time from the payees list.
deactivateUnused.maxTransactionsLabel: {count, plural, one {# or fewer transaction} other {# or fewer transactions}}
deactivateUnused.maxTransactionsHelp: Only include payees with this many transactions or fewer
deactivateUnused.monthsUnusedHelp: Only include payees not used since this long ago (or never used)

empty.line1: No payees match the current criteria.

deactivateUnused.selectedCount: {count, plural, one {# payee selected} other {# payees selected}}
deactivateUnused.deactivateButton: Deactivate {count, plural, one {# Payee} other {# Payees}}

toasts.selectAtLeastOne: Please select at least one payee to deactivate

reactivate.title: Reactivate Payee?
reactivate.message: The payee "{name}" was previously deactivated. Would you like to reactivate it so it appears in payee dropdowns again?

aliases.heading: Aliases
aliases.description: Aliases map imported payee names to this payee. Use * as wildcard (e.g., "STARBUCKS*"). Case-insensitive.
